name: components/alert
description: A callout box that displays important messages, warnings, or feedback to users. Provides two visual variants (default and destructive) with automatic icon grid layout, title and description composition, and built-in support for keyboard focus rings. Based on Kobalte Alert with full ARIA live-region support.
useCases: Form validation feedback to inform users of submission success or required corrections
System status banners to communicate maintenance windows or service outages
Destructive alerts for irreversible action confirmations (e.g., deleting an account or resource)
Inline contextual hints within dashboards or wizard steps to guide user decisions
usage: import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription, alertVariants } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/alert"
